title: sk-doc tells agents to remove spec YAML frontmatter that Spec Kit templates now require
claim: sk-doc's frontmatter guide says specs use inline metadata instead of YAML and should have frontmatter removed, but current Spec Kit templates and active packets begin with YAML frontmatter carrying title, description and trigger phrases.
recommendation: Update sk-doc frontmatter policy to preserve Spec Kit spec frontmatter and distinguish external informal specs from indexed Spec Kit packet docs.

title: sk-doc filename standards still require snake_case despite hyphenated shipped docs
claim: sk-doc still documents lowercase snake_case Markdown filenames and hyphen-to-underscore autofixes while the shipped playbook package uses hyphenated filenames and validates them as clean.
recommendation: Replace the old snake_case blanket rule with package-specific filename rules, or teach the validator to enforce the documented convention if it is still intended.
